description_long: This is a large, vertically-oriented cylindrical storage tank with a domed top and three conical support legs. The tank features a circular manway or access hatch on the top surface, as well as a smaller capped nozzle and a visible valve or fitting. The body of the tank is smooth and metallic, likely constructed from stainless steel, and is designed to hold liquids or gases. The conical legs elevate the tank above the ground, providing stability and allowing for easy access underneath. The tank's surface is unpainted, giving it a uniform metallic gray appearance. Its robust construction and fittings suggest it is intended for industrial or municipal storage applications.
description: A large, vertical cylindrical storage tank with a domed top, three conical support legs, and metallic gray finish. It features a top access hatch and visible valve fittings.
description_view_0: This view shows the domed top with a capped nozzle and a tilted access hatch, as well as the three conical support legs.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the top hatch and a prominent valve fitting, with the cylindrical body and all three legs visible.
description_view_2: The access hatch and capped nozzle are clearly visible on the domed top, along with the smooth cylindrical body and support legs.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the rear side, showing the top hatch from behind and the three conical legs, with no visible valves.
